visual_source: Claude Destiny aesthetic redesign + supplied Ghost loader
preservation_policy: Preserve working Vault transfers, Bungie authentication, builder behavior, local loadouts, and the established visual design while fixing the reported navigation and data-presentation gaps.
changes: parallel downloads inside dependency-safe startup phases
real visible workspace panels with heavy-view overlay routing
ritual vendor ordering and faction-emblem presentation
profile and character kiosk component support for Monument of Triumph entries
Vanguard, Crucible, Gambit, raid, and dungeon operation lanes
signed-in CharacterActivities enrichment for current Director nodes
full tiered-weapon socket choices from instance reusable plugs, inline socket plugs, and reusable/randomized plug sets
service worker and manifest cache invalidation for v12
validation: all workspace panels and action routes pass headless DOM tests
vendor order, kiosk grouping, live-fragment rendering, and six-choice tiered socket merging pass synthetic runtime tests
local asset references, JSON files, CSS brace balance, and duplicate HTML IDs pass static validation
live_test_requirement: Bungie-authenticated kiosk contents, current operations data, exact vendor sales, and transfers must be smoke-tested after deployment on the registered OAuth origin.
